title: Prepare MVP README, protocol/client setup docs, limitations, and next-step optimization plan

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Write concise MVP handoff documentation for developers.
goals: Document setup, build, test, broker run commands, mock/pi provider config, protocol, and client setup.
Document known limitations around pi latency, quality, Obsidian/VS Code host testing, and future provider replacements.
Keep docs concise and operational; avoid tutorial framing.
non_goals: Do not hide failed smoke results.
safety: Do not edit files tagged human-written.
success_criteria: README lets a new developer start the broker and connect at least one client.
Protocol docs and client setup docs are discoverable.
